'''Tla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|Warrior]] who was promoted to the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He led an invasion [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|fleet]] following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Commander [[Shedao Shai]] at [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], into whose vacant position Tla was escalated. Tla's time as a commander was brief, however, as he quickly became embroiled in a plot to eliminate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]; the scheme came unraveled before long and the commander was recalled from the front lines.

==Biography==
Tla was tall and broad-shouldered, even for a Yuuzhan Vong. He was promoted to the rank of commander due to the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Shedao Shai]] at the [[Battle of Ithor]]. Encouraged by his [[Battle Tactician|battle tactician]], [[Raff]], Tla led a [[First Battle of Obroa-skai|raid]] on the library [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]].

Like many [[Warrior caste|Warriors]], Commander Tla was dismissive of the other [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|castes]], and felt the Warriors were greater than even the [[Priest caste]]. As such, he resented [[Priest/Legends|Priest]] [[Harrar]]'s presence at the First Battle of Obroa-skai. However, Tla supported the plan Harrar and [[Nom Anor]] formed to assassinate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] using [[Elan]]. When the plan failed, Harrar and Tla were recalled to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] by [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]].
